title: rubus koehleri subsp. gerezianus
intro: Rubus koehleri subsp. gerezianus, also known as the Gerez raspberry, is a subspecies of the Rubus koehleri plant, a type of wild raspberry native to North Africa and the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus koehleri subsp. gerezianus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, among others. The plant is typically used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
